query:
-- How many UCXcel Webex Basic services does ASG Hail have in the workbook?
SELECT 
  swl.productName, swl.productType, swl.amountExGst, swl.quantity,
  COUNT(*) AS line_count
FROM supplier_workbook_line_items swl
JOIN supplier_workbook_uploads swu ON swu.id = swl.uploadId
WHERE swu.supplierName LIKE '%SasBoss%' OR swu.supplierName LIKE '%Access4%'
  AND swl.customerName LIKE '%ASG Hail%'
GROUP BY swl.productName, swl.productType, swl.amountExGst, swl.quantity
HAVING swl.productName LIKE '%UCXcel Webex Basic%' OR swl.productName LIKE '%Webex Basic%'
LIMIT 10;
